PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 5, 2001 is admitted to probate. Clyde Wong is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed the probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Nov-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
